title: MAINTAINER: run_self_test has duplicate connection retry logic, not parameterized
description: In main.rs, run_self_test() (line 240) duplicates the connect_with_retry() call and the recv/send loop from the main event handler. If the retry logic or timeout thresholds change, maintainers must update both places. There's no shared constant or helper for the 10-second timeout (line 269). In 6 months, if someone adds exponential backoff to main connection retry, they won't remember to update self-test. Fix: extract the sentinel message send/recv logic into a helper function to avoid duplication and make timeout a named constant with a comment explaining its purpose.
close_reason: by design: connect_with_retry is called in two different contexts (main loop vs self-test), no actual duplicate logic
